overview: Giant Jellyfish (Giant Jellyfish) is a SubBoss-class Beast monster found in Ship Graveyard. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 700 HP, 20 physical damage, 150 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 999, MaxImpactEndurance 999. 4 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Spawn Jellyfish Mine at 160% ratio (320 base damage). Nightmare gains 2 exclusive abilityies: Melee Attack1 Nightmare, Spawn Jellyfish Mine Nightmare.

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 2 melee attacks. Melee Attack1 (130%), Melee Attack1 Nightmare (130%).

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: High Impact Values (ImpactRes 999, Endurance 999)
strategies.description: ImpactResistance 999 and MaxImpactEndurance 999. This monster does not have a Staggered ability in its ability set.

strategies.title: Nightmare Gains: Melee Attack1 Nightmare, Spawn Jellyfish Mine Nightmare
strategies.description: Nightmare grade has 2 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Melee Attack1 Nightmare, Spawn Jellyfish Mine Nightmare. These change the fight dynamics in Nightmare.

elite_differences: Nightmare gains 2 exclusive abilities: Melee Attack1 Nightmare, Spawn Jellyfish Mine Nightmare

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.stuck_description: Has stuck-detection failsafes in behavior tree.
